diff:
diff --git a/src/urls.py b/src/urls.py
index ff13c91..f08c596 100644
--- a/src/urls.py
+++ b/src/urls.py
@@ -1,2 +1,9 @@
 def join_url(base, path):
-    return f"{base}/{path}".replace("//", "/")
+    # Avoid collapsing scheme separators like http:// or https://
+    # Only collapse double slashes that occur after the scheme
+    if base.endswith('/') and path.startswith('/'): 
+        return base + path[1:]
+    elif not base.endswith('/') and not path.startswith('/'): 
+        return base + '/' + path
+    else:
+        return base + path
